race.comment: REDADEL (5) confidence is high after he went forward and proved too sharp when saluting over 2105m at Tuncurry. Should park just off the speed despite a difficult draw. Meets a stronger field and should get through the going. Each-way. BRIGHT THE SUN (10) was back in grade when she chipped away late to finish third over 2200m at Ipswich. Has her share of talent and is hard fit for this. ROCK THE MACHINE (3) handy gelding racing in career-best form. Big jump in class with a tidy on-pace fifth over 1800m at Port Macquarie. Expected to get the trip and appears to get through all conditions. CASTEL TROSINO (4) was prominent at the turn in stronger company for a game third over 2200m at Grafton in BM66 class. Can overcome the awkward draw. Each-way. The chances don't end there.
